query: INSERT INTO kb_access_grants (id, kb_id, principal_type, principal_id, permission, granted_by) VALUES ($1, $2, ($3::text)::principal_type, $4, ($5::text)::kb_permission, $6) ON CONFLICT (kb_id, principal_type, principal_id) DO UPDATE SET permission = EXCLUDED.permission, granted_by = EXCLUDED.granted_by
